content.en:
Extreme Demon Domain, in the void.

The Lord of the Serpent tried his best to escape, his speed was fast and his recovery power was immense, making it difficult to kill.

Thus, he was chosen to take the causal purple flower.

As long as he leaves the Extreme Dao Demon Domain alive and enters the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, then he will be a great hero, and he will definitely be valued and cultivated by his master, and there is absolutely no problem in becoming the perfect controller of the True Realm.

"Lord of the Serpent, don't try to escape!"

A black, invisible web spreads across the void.

This scene made the Lord of the Serpent's face change.

"This is the Extreme Dao Treasure that covers time and space, damn it, there is a Void Realm Perfect Controller who has come in with the Extreme Dao Treasure!" "The Lord of the Blue Snake knew that he was in trouble.

Under normal circumstances, a Realm Perfection Controller does not have Extreme Path Treasures, only the top True Realm Perfect Masters have their own Extreme Path Treasures, and they are not afraid of being robbed.

And if a Perfect Controller of the Void Realm reveals the secret that he has an Extreme Treasure, unless there is such a background as the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm behind him, he will not want to live the next day, and he will definitely be killed and robbed.

Obviously, this Extreme Path creature definitely does not have an Extreme Treasure, and this Extreme Treasure was given by the big man behind him, and it was specially used for imprisoning and blocking.

At the moment, his speed was limited.

"Execute the second plan, cover!"

The Lord of the Serpent sends a message to other Extreme Creatures.

The next moment.

An Extreme Path creature emerges to intercept other Extreme Path creatures on behalf of the Lord of the Serpent, including the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm with the Extreme Realm Treasure.

However.

More Extreme Creatures have emerged, under the command of different bigwigs.

Thundered!!!!

Battles are all over the area, and from time to time extreme creatures fall.

Here, the lives of the Perfect Masters of the Shroud are completely worthless.

When Ye Tian saw this scene, he couldn't help but sigh: "In the Extreme Deep Sea, the perfect controller of the Void Realm really has no status!"

Ant!

That's right, it's ants!

At the end of the realm, a Perfect Controller of the Realm is an absolute high-level, and if there is a Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm, the Perfect Controller of the Infinite Realm will be valued by the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm.

Where is like the Extreme Deep Sea, the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller treats the Void Realm Perfect Controller as an ant, and does not care about their sacrifice.

"It's almost, it's time to do it!"

Ye Tian escaped into the Primordial Black Sea.

......

Bang!

The Lord of the Serpent was injured, but in order to take away the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect, it was worth it even if he was seriously injured and dying.

"It's fast to the Extreme Dao Demon Gate, as long as they get to the Extreme Dao Demon Gate, they won't dare to do it!"

The Lord of the Serpent said secretly.

But suddenly, the breath of death enveloped him.

Time and space froze, and he couldn't move.

At this time, he seemed to see a dark area, and a golden paw poked out.

"Beyond the existence of the perfect controller of the Void Realm, it is impossible, how can such an existence enter the Extreme Dao Demon Domain? Even those big people in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace can't enter here!"

The Lord of the Serpent was shocked.

But then, he understood.

This Extreme Dao creature is indeed the perfect controller of the Void Realm, but its strength far surpasses that of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm.

"Master, I've failed!"

This last thought crossed the serpent's mind.

The next moment.

His body was pierced by the golden claws, and the remnants were taken away and vanished.

All around, a group of extreme creatures were stunned.

The Lord of the Serpent was killed in one move, and the body was taken away?

"Who is it?"

Their will scoured the surroundings, but found nothing.

As for the Primordial Black Sea, they didn't know such a place yet, so they couldn't figure out where the corpse of the Lord of the Serpent had gone, and who was the Extreme Creature who shot it?

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian took out the causal purple flower from the corpse of the Lord of the Blue Snake.

"I succeeded in obtaining the causal purple flower, but it's a pity that it was exposed!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Although those Extreme Dao creatures didn't see him, those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace didn't need to see it in person, they only needed to invite a strong person who was proficient in the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect.

For example, if you comprehend the extreme path of cause and effect above the realm of Xiaocheng, you can find out that he did it through the relationship between cause and effect.

Swish!

Ye Tian continued to shuttle from the Primordial Black Sea, and then through the Primordial Black Sea, he handed over the Cause and Effect Purple Flower to Ye Tian's copy body.

This alternation took place in the primordial Black Sea, and no one knows about it.

And then.

Ye Tian himself lifted the Void Sparrow to copy his body, thus completely severing the causal connection.

No matter how awesome the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace were, they could only find the Void Sparrow, but they couldn't find him.

"That's it, I got the causal purple flower, and I made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

......

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

The matter of the Extreme Dao Demon Domain was passed here.

"Guys, which of you got the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect?"

The Lord of the Demon Serpent grinned.

He was very angry, according to the intelligence, the Lord of the Serpent under his command was about to succeed, but he was suddenly killed, and it is not clear who made the attack.

"I didn't get the causal purple flower. "

"I didn't get the Purple Flower of Cause and Effect either!"

"Lord of the Demon Snake, you got it yourself, did that little snake guy fake his death?"

"Ghost Dragon, the Lord of the Serpent under my command has indeed been killed, and I suspect that you did it. "

A group of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers argued.

"Don't argue, it's just a small matter, whoever obtains the causal purple flower, just say it. The Lord of the Dragon Serpent said.

The Lord of the Demon Snake nodded, "The Lord of the Dragon Snake is right, whoever did it should say it." "

However, Infinite Dao Creatures admitted.

"Maybe we didn't do it!"

Said the Lord of the Holy Spirit.

"We didn't do it?"

The Lord of the Demon Serpent was shocked.

At this time, the Lord of the Holy Spirit released an image: "This is the image of the hands. Although we can't enter the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, my subordinates have intercepted this space-time image with the Extreme Dao Treasure, so let's take a look. "

I saw that the Lord of the Serpent was instantly killed in the picture, but he was taken away.

Because it was the Extreme Dao Treasure that intercepted the image of time and space, the aura was revealed, and one of the black breaths attracted the attention of many Extreme Realm Perfection Chapter controllers.

"This is the breath of the primordial Black Sea!"

The Lord of the Demon Serpent was shocked.

The Lord of the Dragon and Snake exclaimed: "Impossible, the enemy is from the Primordial Black Sea, at least he has to be the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, how could the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller enter the Extreme Dao Demon Domain? That is the Extreme Dao Demon Domain jointly opened up by a large number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and a single Extreme Realm Perfect Controller cannot compete with the rules of the Extreme Dao Demon Domain at all." "

"I don't understand either. The Lord of Light Worms shook his head, "However, we can find out the identity of the other party through cause and effect. Presumably, you have this plan before, just waiting for the Extreme Creature to admit it. Although the causal purple flower is not too precious, there is only one. But now, with the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm entering the Extreme Dao Demon Domain, this matter is serious and must be thoroughly investigated. I have already informed a palace master, and the palace master will be there soon. "
